name: Space-News-Platform
disc: A modern space news platform designed to provide users with the latest updates on space exploration, astronomy, and related topics. The platform features a clean UI and interactive elements that allow users to easily navigate through news articles, view multimedia content, and stay informed about the latest developments in the field of space science.

name: Todo-Platform
disc: A modern to-do list platform designed to help users manage tasks efficiently and stay organized.

name: Eco-Saver-Platform
disc: A modern environmental awareness platform designed to help users understand climate issues, track pollution levels, and learn tips for protecting the planet. Built with a clean UI and interactive features that encourage users to adopt eco-friendly habits and explore global environmental data.

name: 3D-Weather-App
disc: An interactive weather application built with Next.js, providing a smooth user experience to display current and forecasted weather for any city worldwide. This is a single-page application (SPA) with a modern and dynamic design using powerful visualization libraries like Three.js and Chart.js.

name: Memory-Card
disc: A fun and interactive memory card game built with Next.js, where players flip cards to find matching pairs. The game features smooth animations, score tracking, and responsive design for all devices.

name: Quraan-web
disc: A comprehensive Quran platform allowing you to listen to 5 different reciters, featuring interactive reading with verse highlighting, or choosing between reading-only and listening-only modes for a seamless experience.

name: JS-Exame-Platform
disc: A JavaScript testing platform where users can see the correct answers and explanations after completing the exam. Currently, it works as a static exam, but we are developing it to generate customized exams based on three inputs: topic, difficulty level, and number of questions.

name: Weather-App
disc: An interactive weather application built with Next.js, providing a smooth user experience to display current and forecasted weather for any city worldwide.
